function.name: match_martial_world_school
function.description: Match user to a professional school in Martial World based on their role or what they're working on. Use this when user mentions building products, designing interfaces, creating content, or growing business.

user_input.description: User's natural language description of what they're working on or their professional role. Examples: 'I want to build an app', 'I'm a designer working on UI', 'I need to write marketing copy', 'I want to grow my user base'

function.name: execute_martial_world_skill
function.description: Execute a professional skill from Martial World to help with specific tasks like breaking down projects, analyzing requirements, writing documents, prioritizing features, or planning growth strategies.

school_id.description: The school ID obtained from match_martial_world_school. Valid values: 1 (Product Manager), 2 (Designer), 3 (Copywriter), 4 (Growth Operator)

user_task.description: User's specific task description. Examples: 'Help me break down project tasks', 'Analyze user requirements', 'Write a PRD document', 'Prioritize features', 'Plan a growth campaign'
